programme.title: PL: Burnley v Crystal Palace Hlts

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Nott'm Forest Hlts

programme.desc: Coverage from the men's singles final, which take place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Last year's final saw Spain's Carlos Alcaraz fight back from two sets down to beat Jannik Sinner and claim his second successive French Open title. Sinner had won the first two sets 6-4 and 7-6 but the tide turned in the third set as Alcaraz won 6-4. The final two sets both went to tie-breaks before the Spaniard won them to win his fifth Major title.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: New York Yankees v Boston Red Sox (Start-time 6.35pm). Coverage of the American League match from Yankee Stadium, as the two rivals go head to head in the final game of the series. These two teams last met in another three-match series in Boston back in April as the Yankees came away with a 3-0 series victory thanks to 4-0. 4-1 and 4-2 wins.

Bangladesh have only ever beaten Australia once in ODI's, with that sole victory coming in a tri-series match in Cardiff 21 years ago.
